---
title: "Factores que predicen la expectativa media"
author: "Kenny Fang, Sebastián Rocha, Juan Pablo Salcedo, Catalina Sandoval"
date: "2026-05-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Proyecto

```{r}
library(readxl)
base <- `LifeExpectancyData.(1)`
names(base) <- trimws(names(base))
names(base) <- make.names(names(base))
set.seed(2025)
muestra <- base[ sample((nrow(base)), size=300, replace = FALSE), ]
#summary(base)
```
